name: tibco-vectordb-rerank
title: Rerank Documents
description: Re-rank a list of documents by relevance to a query (Cohere, Jina, etc.).

display.description: Cross-encoder reranking for improved RAG precision

display.name: Rerank API Endpoint
display.description: URL of the rerank API (e.g. https://api.cohere.ai/v1/rerank)

display.name: API Key
display.description: Bearer token for the rerank API

input.name: documents
input.schema: {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "properties": {"text": {"type": "string", "description": "Text content to score against the query"}}, "required": ["text"], "description": "Each item must have a 'text' field. Additional fields are preserved."}}

output.name: rankedDocuments
output.schema: {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "properties": {"index": {"type": "integer", "description": "Original position in the input documents array"}, "score": {"type": "number", "description": "Relevance score assigned by the reranker"}, "document": {"type": "object", "properties": {"text": {"type": "string"}}}}}}
